title: AI Dev 26 x SF | AI Developer Conference
excerpts:
Section Title: About the AI Developer Conference > Your Host
Content:
Andrew Ng
He was the founding lead of the Google Brain team, which helped Google transform into a modern AI company. He served as VP & Chief Scientist at Baidu, where he led a 1,300-person AI team responsible for the company's AI technology and strategy. He was formerly Director of the Stanford AI Lab, home to 20+ faculty members and research groups. In 2023, he was named to the Time100 AI list of the most influential AI persons in the world.
DeepLearning.AI
DeepLearning.AI was founded in 2017 by machine learning and education pioneer Andrew Ng to address the growing need for accessible, world-class AI education. Dedicated to growing and connecting a global community of AI builders and enthusiasts, DeepLearning.AI offers educational programs that combine developing strong subject matter intuition with practical, hands-on training.

title: Andrew Ng keynote: AI, agents, and applications | ScaleUp:AI 2024 - YouTube
excerpts:
Section Title: Andrew Ng keynote: AI, agents, and applications | ScaleUp:AI 2024 > Comments
Content:
Top comments Newest first ## Description
Andrew Ng keynote: AI, agents, and applications | ScaleUp:AI 2024
20 Likes 1,351 Views Mar 17 2025 In recent years, a spotlight in AI has been on large language models (LLMs). Building on them, a new set of design patterns is emerging with the rise of AI agents and agentic reasoning, in which systems can reflect, plan, use tools (function calls), and collaborate in multi-agent designs. These design patterns are proving to be both cost-effective and powerful for quickly building numerous new applications. This presentation will describe the rise of agentic workflows and the opportunities this creates. Featuring: Andrew Ng Founder and Executive Chairman Landing AI … ...more

Welcome to the official DeepLearning.AI YouTube channel! Here you can find the videos from our Coursera programs on machine learning as well as recorded events.
DeepLearning.AI was founded in 2017 by machine learning and education pioneer Andrew Ng to fill a need for world-class AI education.
DeepLearning.AI has created high-quality AI programs on Coursera that have gained an extensive global following. By providing a platform for education and fostering a tight-knit community, DeepLearning.AI has become the pathway for anyone looking to build an AI career.

title: Andrew Ng says AI is 'limited,' won't replace humans anytime soon
excerpts:
Section Title: An AI pioneer says the technology is 'limited' and won't replace humans anytime soon
Content:
Andrew Ng sees AI as a revolution in the making, predicting continued progress despite controversies and claims of a bubble.
Andrew Ng delivers a keynote address at the AI Developer Conference in New York in November. Joe Jenkins

title: Andrew Ng's career advice for AI practitioners, straight from Stanford | by Marco Kotrotsos | Apr, 2026 | Medium
excerpts: In late 2025, Andrew Ng opened his Stanford CS230 lecture with a claim: this is the best time ever to build a career in AI.
